title: Health Based Mob Scaling
description: Mobs grow bigger and stronger based on their health. Dynamic scaling for a more immersive Minecraft experience.
body:
# 🧬 LifeScale – Health-Based Mob Scaling

Bring your world to life with dynamic mob scaling!

**LifeScale** makes every mob's size and movement scale with its health — creating a more immersive and challenging gameplay experience.

---

## ⚡ Features

- 📈 Mobs grow larger as their health increases
- 🦶 Step height increases with size (bigger mobs climb better)
- ⚙️ Fully automatic — no commands needed
- 🚀 Optimized for performance (updates once per second)
- 👥 Only affects mobs near players (reduces lag)

---

## 🧠 How It Works

Every mob dynamically updates:

- **Scale = Health × 0.25**
- **Step Height = Health × 0.125**

This means:
- Strong mobs become massive
- Weak mobs shrink down

---

## 🎮 Gameplay Impact

- Boss fights feel more intense
- Natural difficulty scaling
- More visual feedback for mob strength

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.1 (or compatible 1.21.x)**
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

## 🧪 Performance

- Updates every 20 ticks (1 second)
- Only affects mobs within 128 blocks of players
- Designed for smooth gameplay even in large worlds

---

## 📦 Future Plans

- Config file for scaling values
- Smooth scaling animations
- Per-mob customization

---

## 💬 Feedback

Have ideas or found a bug? Feel free to suggest improvements!

---

## 🏷️ Keywords

mob scaling, health based mobs, dynamic mobs, fabric mod, minecraft 1.21 mod, realistic mobs
